---
pagetitle: "The Conversation Loop"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<!-- The Conversation Loop, Experience 6: Thinking with AI -->
<!-- 30-60 minutes | All roles -->
<!-- Stepped layout: linear forward, free backward -->

<div id="experience-app" data-experience-id="the-conversation-loop" style="font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; max-width: 1080px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; color: #E2E8F0; position: relative;">

  <!-- Navigation -->
  <nav class="sp-nav" data-page="the-conversation-loop">
    <button class="sp-nav-toggle" aria-label="Menu" aria-expanded="false">
      <span class="sp-nav-icon">&#9776;</span>
    </button>
    <a href="../arrivals-hall.html" class="sp-nav-brand">AI Skills Passport</a>
    <div class="sp-nav-menu">
      <a href="../arrivals-hall.html" class="sp-nav-item sp-nav-home" data-nav="arrivals-hall">The Arrivals Hall</a>
      <a href="../key-takeaways.html" class="sp-nav-item sp-nav-toplevel" data-nav="key-takeaways">Key Takeaways</a>
      <div class="sp-nav-group" data-group="experiences">
        <a href="../experiences.html" class="sp-nav-heading" data-nav="experiences">Experiences</a>
        <div class="sp-nav-dropdown">
          <a href="is-this-ai.html" class="sp-nav-item" data-nav="is-this-ai">Is This AI?</a>
                <a href="what-would-you-do.html" class="sp-nav-item" data-nav="what-would-you-do">What Would You Do?</a>
                <a href="rules-of-engagement.html" class="sp-nav-item" data-nav="rules-of-engagement">Rules of Engagement</a>
                <a href="teaching-with-ai.html" class="sp-nav-item" data-nav="teaching-with-ai">Working with AI</a>
                <a href="the-conversation-loop.html" class="sp-nav-item" data-nav="the-conversation-loop">The Conversation Loop</a>
                <a href="working-with-copilot.html" class="sp-nav-item" data-nav="working-with-copilot">Working with Copilot</a>
                <div class="sp-nav-separator"></div>
                <a href="ai-proof-assessments.html" class="sp-nav-item" data-nav="ai-proof-assessments">AI-Proof Your Assessments</a>
                <a href="researching-with-ai.html" class="sp-nav-item" data-nav="researching-with-ai">Researching with AI</a>
                <a href="streamlining-your-workflows.html" class="sp-nav-item" data-nav="streamlining-your-workflows">Streamlining Your Workflows</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="sp-nav-group" data-group="resources">
        <a href="../resources.html" class="sp-nav-heading" data-nav="resources">Resources</a>
        <div class="sp-nav-dropdown">
          <a href="../ai-toolkit.html" class="sp-nav-item" data-nav="ai-toolkit">AI Toolkit</a>
          <a href="../passport.html" class="sp-nav-item" data-nav="passport">My Passport</a>
          <a href="../onboarding.html" class="sp-nav-item" data-nav="onboarding">Find Your Path</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="sp-nav-group" data-group="more">
        <a href="../more.html" class="sp-nav-heading" data-nav="more">More</a>
        <div class="sp-nav-dropdown">
          <a href="https://forms.office.com/r/3531YvKVeg?origin=lprLink" class="sp-nav-item" target="_blank" data-nav="ai-in-5">AI in 5</a>
          <a href="../ai-in-5-archive.html" class="sp-nav-item" data-nav="ai-in-5-archive">AI in 5 Archive</a>
          <a href="../contact.html" class="sp-nav-item" data-nav="contact">Contact</a>
          <a href="../about.html" class="sp-nav-item" data-nav="about">About</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </nav>
  <script>
  (function() {
    var toggle = document.querySelector('.sp-nav-toggle');
    var menu = document.querySelector('.sp-nav-menu');
    if (toggle && menu) {
      toggle.addEventListener('click', function() {
        var open = menu.classList.toggle('is-open');
        toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', open);
      });
      document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        if (!e.target.closest('.sp-nav')) {
          menu.classList.remove('is-open');
          toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
        }
      });
    }
    var nav = document.querySelector('.sp-nav');
    var page = nav ? nav.getAttribute('data-page') : null;
    if (page) {
      var el = nav.querySelector('[data-nav="' + page + '"]');
      if (el) {
        el.classList.add('is-active');
        var group = el.closest('.sp-nav-group');
        if (group) group.classList.add('has-active-child');
      }
    }
  })();
  </script>


  <!-- Header (always visible) -->
  <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0F172A 0%, #1E293B 100%); border-radius: 16px; padding: 32px; margin-bottom: 28px;">
    <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 3px; color: #64748B; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px;">Experience 6</div>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 12px;">
      <span style="font-size: 48px;">&#x1F504;</span>
      <div>
        <h1 style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 28px; color: #F1F5F9; margin: 0; letter-spacing: 1px;">THE CONVERSATION LOOP</h1>
        <p style="font-size: 14px; color: #94A3B8; margin: 4px 0 0 0;">Thinking with AI</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <p style="font-size: 15px; color: #94A3B8; margin: 0; line-height: 1.6;">Learn a four-stage loop that keeps you in the conversation with AI, amplifying your thinking instead of outsourcing it.</p>
    <div style="margin-top: 16px; display: flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
      <span style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 12px; color: #94A3B8; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;">&#x23F1;&#xFE0F; 30-60 min</span>
      <span style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 12px; color: #94A3B8; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;">&#x1F4DA; All Roles</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ===== PROGRESS BAR ===== -->
  <div id="progress-bar" style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0; margin-bottom: 28px; padding: 16px 12px; background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
    <!-- Steps are rendered by JS -->
  </div>

  <!-- ===== STEP 1: Welcome ===== -->
  <div class="exp-step" data-step="1" style="display: none;">
    <div style="background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 28px;">
      <p style="color: #CBD5E1; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0 0 16px 0; font-size: 16px;">You know that delegation feels productive but erodes capability. Hand a task to AI, accept the output, move on &mdash; and somewhere along the way you stop thinking about the problem yourself. This experience teaches you the alternative: a four-stage loop that keeps <em>you</em> in the conversation.</p>
      <p style="color: #94A3B8; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0; font-size: 15px;">The difference between people who use AI well and people who use AI poorly is not the tool. It is whether they stay in the conversation or walk away from it.</p>
    </div>

    <div style="background: #0D2818; border: 1px solid #1A4731; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; margin-bottom: 28px;">
      <h3 style="font-size: 14px; color: #86EFAC; margin: 0 0 12px 0; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px;">By the end of this experience, you will:</h3>
      <ul style="margin: 0; padding-left: 20px; color: #4ADE80; line-height: 1.8;">
        <li>Distinguish conversation from delegation when working with AI</li>
        <li>Apply the four stages of the conversation loop to a real task</li>
        <li>Recognise when errors compound in unchecked AI chains</li>
        <li>Identify the three cognitive traps that shape how people relate to AI</li>
        <li>Evaluate AI output using proportional scepticism</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div style="background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 28px;">
      <h3 style="font-size: 18px; color: #E2E8F0; margin: 0 0 12px 0;">How this experience works</h3>
      <p style="color: #94A3B8; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0 0 12px 0;">This experience has <strong style="color: #E2E8F0;">6 steps</strong>. Work through each one at your own pace. You can revisit any completed step by clicking it in the progress bar above.</p>
      <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;">
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;">
          <span style="background: #4F46E5; color: white; width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; flex-shrink: 0;">1</span>
          <span style="color: #CBD5E1; font-size: 14px;">Welcome &amp; Overview</span>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;">
          <span style="background: #2D2D4A; color: #64748B; width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; flex-shrink: 0;">2</span>
          <span style="color: #64748B; font-size: 14px;">The Loop &mdash; Brainstorm, Ideate, Iterate, Amplify</span>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;">
          <span style="background: #2D2D4A; color: #64748B; width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; flex-shrink: 0;">3</span>
          <span style="color: #64748B; font-size: 14px;">Try the Loop &mdash; Hands-On Practice</span>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;">
          <span style="background: #2D2D4A; color: #64748B; width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; flex-shrink: 0;">4</span>
          <span style="color: #64748B; font-size: 14px;">Amplify Your Thinking, Not the Hallucinations</span>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;">
          <span style="background: #2D2D4A; color: #64748B; width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; flex-shrink: 0;">5</span>
          <span style="color: #64748B; font-size: 14px;">Three Cognitive Traps</span>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;">
          <span style="background: #2D2D4A; color: #64748B; width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; flex-shrink: 0;">6</span>
          <span style="color: #64748B; font-size: 14px;">Key Takeaways &amp; Completion</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="text-align: center; padding: 20px 0;">
      <button onclick="goToStep(2)" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4F46E5, #7C3AED); color: white; border: none; padding: 14px 40px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer;">Let's Go &#8594;</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ===== STEP 2: The Loop ===== -->
  <div class="exp-step" data-step="2" style="display: none;">
    <div style="margin-bottom: 32px;">
      <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 2px; color: #64748B; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px;">Activity 1</div>
      <h2 style="font-size: 22px; color: #E2E8F0; margin: 0 0 16px 0;">The Loop: Brainstorm &rarr; Ideate &rarr; Iterate &rarr; Amplify</h2>
      <p style="color: #94A3B8; margin-bottom: 24px; line-height: 1.7;">Most people treat AI as a vending machine: insert prompt, receive output, walk away. The conversation loop is different. It keeps you thinking at every stage.</p>

      <!-- Loop Diagram -->
      <div style="background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 16px; padding: 28px; margin-bottom: 28px;">
        <div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0; margin-bottom: 24px;">
          <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4F46E5, #6366F1); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px 20px; text-align: center; min-width: 120px;">
            <div style="font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 4px;">&#x1F9E0;</div>
            <div style="font-weight: bold; color: #E2E8F0; font-size: 14px;">BRAINSTORM</div>
            <div style="font-size: 11px; color: #C7D2FE;">Define your question</div>
          </div>
          <div style="color: #4F46E5; font-size: 24px; padding: 0 8px;">&#8594;</div>
          <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7C3AED, #8B5CF6); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px 20px; text-align: center; min-width: 120px;">
            <div style="font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 4px;">&#x1F4A1;</div>
            <div style="font-weight: bold; color: #E2E8F0; font-size: 14px;">IDEATE</div>
            <div style="font-size: 11px; color: #DDD6FE;">Go wide</div>
          </div>
          <div style="color: #7C3AED; font-size: 24px; padding: 0 8px;">&#8594;</div>
          <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #DB2777, #EC4899); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px 20px; text-align: center; min-width: 120px;">
            <div style="font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 4px;">&#x1F504;</div>
            <div style="font-weight: bold; color: #E2E8F0; font-size: 14px;">ITERATE</div>
            <div style="font-size: 11px; color: #FBCFE8;">Push back</div>
          </div>
          <div style="color: #EC4899; font-size: 24px; padding: 0 8px;">&#8594;</div>
          <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #059669, #10B981); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px 20px; text-align: center; min-width: 120px;">
            <div style="font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 4px;">&#x1F680;</div>
            <div style="font-weight: bold; color: #E2E8F0; font-size: 14px;">AMPLIFY</div>
            <div style="font-size: 11px; color: #A7F3D0;">Make it yours</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 8px;">
          <span style="background: #2D2D4A; color: #94A3B8; padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 12px; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; letter-spacing: 1px;">&#x21BB; REPEAT until your thinking has landed</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Stage explanations -->
      <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 28px;">
        <div style="background: #1E1E36; border-left: 4px solid #4F46E5; border-radius: 0 12px 12px 0; padding: 20px;">
          <h4 style="color: #A5B4FC; margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 15px;">&#x1F9E0; Brainstorm &mdash; Define your real question</h4>
          <p style="color: #CBD5E1; margin: 0 0 8px 0; line-height: 1.7;">Before you type a single prompt, ask yourself: <em>Am I describing my problem, or my attempted fix?</em> Most people skip straight to "Write me a..." when the real question is something deeper. A good brainstorm starts with what you actually need to figure out.</p>
          <div style="background: #16162A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; font-size: 13px; color: #94A3B8;">
            <strong style="color: #A5B4FC;">Instead of:</strong> "Write me a rubric for my marketing unit."<br>
            <strong style="color: #A5B4FC;">Try:</strong> "I'm struggling to assess whether students understand segmentation or are just repeating textbook definitions. How might I design assessment criteria that surface real understanding?"
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="background: #1E1E36; border-left: 4px solid #7C3AED; border-radius: 0 12px 12px 0; padding: 20px;">
          <h4 style="color: #C4B5FD; margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 15px;">&#x1F4A1; Ideate &mdash; Go wide</h4>
          <p style="color: #CBD5E1; margin: 0 0 8px 0; line-height: 1.7;">Ask for alternatives, angles you hadn't considered. Resist stopping at the first interesting output. The first response from AI is almost never the best one &mdash; it is the most average one. Push for variety: "What are three completely different ways to approach this?" or "What am I probably not thinking about?"</p>
          <div style="background: #16162A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; font-size: 13px; color: #94A3B8;">
            <strong style="color: #C4B5FD;">The trap:</strong> The first AI response sounds reasonable, so you stop. But reasonable is not the same as right. Keep going.
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="background: #1E1E36; border-left: 4px solid #EC4899; border-radius: 0 12px 12px 0; padding: 20px;">
          <h4 style="color: #F9A8D4; margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 15px;">&#x1F504; Iterate &mdash; Push back</h4>
          <p style="color: #CBD5E1; margin: 0 0 8px 0; line-height: 1.7;">Refine. Redirect. Challenge. This is where conversation actually happens. Say things like: <em>"That's closer, but..."</em> / <em>"The tone is wrong for this audience"</em> / <em>"You're solving the wrong problem."</em> Every pushback sharpens the output and sharpens your own thinking.</p>
          <div style="background: #16162A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; font-size: 13px; color: #94A3B8;">
            <strong style="color: #F9A8D4;">Remember:</strong> AI does not know your context, your students, your colleagues, or your standards. Only you do. Each iteration adds what the AI is missing.
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="background: #1E1E36; border-left: 4px solid #10B981; border-radius: 0 12px 12px 0; padding: 20px;">
          <h4 style="color: #6EE7B7; margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 15px;">&#x1F680; Amplify &mdash; Make it yours</h4>
          <p style="color: #CBD5E1; margin: 0 0 8px 0; line-height: 1.7;">Edit, restructure, bring your voice, your context, your standards. The question to ask yourself: <em>Would I put my name on this?</em> If not, you are not done. Amplify means the final output reflects your expertise, not the AI's averaging.</p>
          <div style="background: #16162A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; font-size: 13px; color: #94A3B8;">
            <strong style="color: #6EE7B7;">The test:</strong> If someone asked you to explain or defend what you produced, could you do it with confidence? That is the sign it is yours.
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="background: #1E1E36; border-left: 4px solid #94A3B8; border-radius: 0 12px 12px 0; padding: 20px;">
          <h4 style="color: #CBD5E1; margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 15px;">&#x21BB; Repeat &mdash; Loop until your thinking has landed</h4>
          <p style="color: #CBD5E1; margin: 0; line-height: 1.7;">Most good work loops more than once. The sign you are done is not that the AI has stopped generating &mdash; it is that <em>your thinking has landed</em>. You know what you think. You can articulate it. The AI helped you get there, but the thinking is yours.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Delegation vs Conversation Comparison -->
      <div style="background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 28px;">
        <h3 style="font-size: 18px; color: #E2E8F0; margin: 0 0 8px 0;">Delegation vs Conversation</h3>
        <p style="color: #94A3B8; margin: 0 0 16px 0; font-size: 14px;">Click a tab to see the same task done two ways: delegation (one prompt, accept output) versus conversation (loop through all four stages).</p>

        <div style="display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
          <button class="context-tab" data-tab="teaching" onclick="switchLoopTab('teaching')" style="background: #4F46E5; color: white; border: none; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold;">Teaching</button>
          <button class="context-tab" data-tab="research" onclick="switchLoopTab('research')" style="background: #1E1E36; color: #64748B; border: none; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;">Research</button>
          <button class="context-tab" data-tab="admin" onclick="switchLoopTab('admin')" style="background: #1E1E36; color: #64748B; border: none; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; font-weight: normal;">Admin</button>
        </div>

        <!-- Teaching panel -->
        <div class="loop-tab-panel" data-panel="teaching" style="display: block;">
          <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px;">
            <div style="background: #3B1010; border: 1px solid #7F1D1D; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px;">
              <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #FCA5A5; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 8px;">&#x274C; DELEGATION</div>
              <p style="color: #FECACA; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0 0 12px 0;"><strong>Task:</strong> Create a rubric for a marketing case study.</p>
              <p style="color: #FCA5A5; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0;"><em>"Write me a rubric for a third-year marketing case study assignment."</em> &rarr; Accept the output. Paste it into the unit outline. Done.</p>
              <p style="color: #94A3B8; font-size: 12px; margin: 8px 0 0 0;">Result: a generic rubric that could belong to any unit at any university.</p>
            </div>
            <div style="background: #0D2818; border: 1px solid #14532D; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px;">
              <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #86EFAC; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 8px;">&#x2705; CONVERSATION</div>
              <p style="color: #BBF7D0; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0 0 12px 0;"><strong>Task:</strong> Create a rubric for a marketing case study.</p>
              <p style="color: #86EFAC; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0;"><strong>Brainstorm:</strong> "What am I really assessing &mdash; application or recall?"<br><strong>Ideate:</strong> "Show me three different rubric structures."<br><strong>Iterate:</strong> "Option 2 is closest but needs a criterion for real-world data use."<br><strong>Amplify:</strong> Edit criteria to reflect your specific unit learning outcomes, add exemplars from your own marking experience.</p>
              <p style="color: #94A3B8; font-size: 12px; margin: 8px 0 0 0;">Result: a rubric shaped by your expertise that you can explain and defend.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Research panel -->
        <div class="loop-tab-panel" data-panel="research" style="display: none;">
          <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px;">
            <div style="background: #3B1010; border: 1px solid #7F1D1D; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px;">
              <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #FCA5A5; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 8px;">&#x274C; DELEGATION</div>
              <p style="color: #FECACA; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0 0 12px 0;"><strong>Task:</strong> Draft a literature review section.</p>
              <p style="color: #FCA5A5; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0;"><em>"Write a literature review on consumer behaviour in sustainable fashion."</em> &rarr; Accept the output. Drop it into the manuscript.</p>
              <p style="color: #94A3B8; font-size: 12px; margin: 8px 0 0 0;">Result: plausible-sounding text with potentially fabricated references and no theoretical positioning.</p>
            </div>
            <div style="background: #0D2818; border: 1px solid #14532D; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px;">
              <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #86EFAC; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 8px;">&#x2705; CONVERSATION</div>
              <p style="color: #BBF7D0; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0 0 12px 0;"><strong>Task:</strong> Draft a literature review section.</p>
              <p style="color: #86EFAC; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0;"><strong>Brainstorm:</strong> "What gap am I actually arguing exists in the literature?"<br><strong>Ideate:</strong> "What are the major theoretical lenses used in this space? Which debates are unresolved?"<br><strong>Iterate:</strong> "You've missed the tension between TPB and practice theory. Reframe around that."<br><strong>Amplify:</strong> Replace AI-suggested references with verified sources, restructure argument to support your specific contribution.</p>
              <p style="color: #94A3B8; font-size: 12px; margin: 8px 0 0 0;">Result: a literature review that reflects your scholarly positioning and uses verified sources.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Admin panel -->
        <div class="loop-tab-panel" data-panel="admin" style="display: none;">
          <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px;">
            <div style="background: #3B1010; border: 1px solid #7F1D1D; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px;">
              <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #FCA5A5; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 8px;">&#x274C; DELEGATION</div>
              <p style="color: #FECACA; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0 0 12px 0;"><strong>Task:</strong> Write a process guide for new staff onboarding.</p>
              <p style="color: #FCA5A5; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0;"><em>"Write an onboarding checklist for new administrative staff."</em> &rarr; Accept the output. Save as PDF. Send to new hires.</p>
              <p style="color: #94A3B8; font-size: 12px; margin: 8px 0 0 0;">Result: a generic checklist missing your specific systems, contacts, and institutional quirks.</p>
            </div>
            <div style="background: #0D2818; border: 1px solid #14532D; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px;">
              <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #86EFAC; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 8px;">&#x2705; CONVERSATION</div>
              <p style="color: #BBF7D0; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0 0 12px 0;"><strong>Task:</strong> Write a process guide for new staff onboarding.</p>
              <p style="color: #86EFAC; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0;"><strong>Brainstorm:</strong> "What do new staff actually struggle with in their first week?"<br><strong>Ideate:</strong> "What formats work best &mdash; checklist, timeline, or FAQ?"<br><strong>Iterate:</strong> "This misses the Curtin-specific systems like OASIS and StaffConnect. Add those."<br><strong>Amplify:</strong> Add real contact names, correct links, and the unofficial tips that only experienced staff know.</p>
              <p style="color: #94A3B8; font-size: 12px; margin: 8px 0 0 0;">Result: a genuinely useful guide that reflects institutional knowledge no AI could have.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div style="text-align: center; padding: 20px 0;">
      <button onclick="goToStep(3)" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4F46E5, #7C3AED); color: white; border: none; padding: 14px 40px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer;">Continue &#8594;</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ===== STEP 3: Try the Loop ===== -->
  <div class="exp-step" data-step="3" style="display: none;">
    <div style="margin-bottom: 32px;">
      <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 2px; color: #64748B; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px;">Activity 2</div>
      <h2 style="font-size: 22px; color: #E2E8F0; margin: 0 0 16px 0;">Try the Loop &mdash; Hands-On Practice</h2>
      <p style="color: #94A3B8; margin-bottom: 24px; line-height: 1.7;">Pick a real task from your work this week. Something you would normally ask AI to help with. Work through the four stages below &mdash; not as prompts to type into a chatbot, but as a thinking exercise.</p>

      <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 28px;">
        <!-- Brainstorm -->
        <div style="background: #1E1E36; border-left: 4px solid #4F46E5; border-radius: 0 12px 12px 0; padding: 20px;">
          <h4 style="color: #A5B4FC; margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 15px;">&#x1F9E0; Stage 1: Brainstorm</h4>
          <p style="color: #94A3B8; margin: 0 0 12px 0; font-size: 14px;">Write your real question here. Not a prompt &mdash; your actual problem or question. What are you really trying to figure out?</p>
          <textarea id="loop-brainstorm" style="width: 100%; min-height: 80px; background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; color: #E2E8F0; font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px; resize: vertical; box-sizing: border-box;" placeholder="e.g. I need to figure out why students aren't engaging with the discussion board, not just get a list of engagement strategies..."></textarea>
        </div>

        <!-- Ideate -->
        <div style="background: #1E1E36; border-left: 4px solid #7C3AED; border-radius: 0 12px 12px 0; padding: 20px;">
          <h4 style="color: #C4B5FD; margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 15px;">&#x1F4A1; Stage 2: Ideate</h4>
          <p style="color: #94A3B8; margin: 0 0 12px 0; font-size: 14px;">What angles or alternatives would you want to explore? What might you be missing? What would you ask AI to help you think about (not do for you)?</p>
          <textarea id="loop-ideate" style="width: 100%; min-height: 80px; background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; color: #E2E8F0; font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px; resize: vertical; box-sizing: border-box;" placeholder="e.g. Is the problem the prompt design, the platform, or student motivation? Are there formats other than text posts that might work better?"></textarea>
        </div>

        <!-- Iterate -->
        <div style="background: #1E1E36; border-left: 4px solid #EC4899; border-radius: 0 12px 12px 0; padding: 20px;">
          <h4 style="color: #F9A8D4; margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 15px;">&#x1F504; Stage 3: Iterate</h4>
          <p style="color: #94A3B8; margin: 0 0 12px 0; font-size: 14px;">What would you push back on? What constraints, context, or corrections would you add? What does the AI not know about your situation?</p>
          <textarea id="loop-iterate" style="width: 100%; min-height: 80px; background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; color: #E2E8F0; font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px; resize: vertical; box-sizing: border-box;" placeholder="e.g. These suggestions assume students have time for weekly posts. Most of mine are working part-time. I need options that work in 10-minute bursts..."></textarea>
        </div>

        <!-- Amplify -->
        <div style="background: #1E1E36; border-left: 4px solid #10B981; border-radius: 0 12px 12px 0; padding: 20px;">
          <h4 style="color: #6EE7B7; margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 15px;">&#x1F680; Stage 4: Amplify</h4>
          <p style="color: #94A3B8; margin: 0 0 12px 0; font-size: 14px;">How would you make the result yours? What do you know that the AI does not? What would you add, remove, or restructure?</p>
          <textarea id="loop-amplify" style="width: 100%; min-height: 80px; background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; color: #E2E8F0; font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px; resize: vertical; box-sizing: border-box;" placeholder="e.g. I'd add the specific Blackboard tools we actually have access to, reference last semester's student feedback, and adjust the tone to match how I actually communicate with my cohort..."></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Reflection -->
      <div style="background: #16162A; border: 2px solid #4F46E5; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 28px;">
        <h4 style="color: #A5B4FC; margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 16px;">&#x1F914; Reflection</h4>
        <p style="color: #CBD5E1; margin: 0 0 12px 0; line-height: 1.7;">Did your question change as you worked through the stages? Did you notice the gap between what you would have prompted and what you actually need? <strong style="color: #E2E8F0;">That is the loop working.</strong></p>
        <p style="color: #94A3B8; margin: 0; line-height: 1.7; font-size: 14px;">Most people find that by Stage 3, they have a much clearer understanding of their own problem &mdash; sometimes clear enough that the AI output matters less than the thinking it prompted.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="text-align: center; padding: 20px 0;">
      <button onclick="goToStep(4)" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4F46E5, #7C3AED); color: white; border: none; padding: 14px 40px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer;">Continue &#8594;</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ===== STEP 4: Amplify Your Thinking, Not the Hallucinations ===== -->
  <div class="exp-step" data-step="4" style="display: none;">
    <div style="margin-bottom: 32px;">
      <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 2px; color: #64748B; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px;">Activity 3</div>
      <h2 style="font-size: 22px; color: #E2E8F0; margin: 0 0 16px 0;">Amplify Your Thinking, Not the Hallucinations</h2>
      <p style="color: #94A3B8; margin-bottom: 24px; line-height: 1.7;">AI makes it easy to chain tasks: take the output from step one and feed it into step two, then step three, and so on. It feels efficient. But there is a hidden cost: if the AI hallucinates in step one, every subsequent step builds on that error &mdash; and makes it harder to spot.</p>

      <!-- Danger box: Error compounding -->
      <div style="background: #3B1010; border: 2px solid #991B1B; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
        <h4 style="color: #FCA5A5; margin: 0 0 16px 0; font-size: 16px;">&#x26A0;&#xFE0F; How errors compound in unchecked chains</h4>
        <div id="error-chain" style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0;">
          <div class="chain-step" data-chain="1" onclick="revealChainStep(1)" style="background: #4A1010; border: 1px solid #7F1D1D; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s;">
            <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;">
              <span style="background: #991B1B; color: #FCA5A5; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; flex-shrink: 0;">1</span>
              <div>
                <div style="color: #FECACA; font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px;">Research summary</div>
                <div class="chain-detail" style="display: none; color: #FCA5A5; font-size: 13px; margin-top: 6px; line-height: 1.6;">AI summarises a research area but invents a study: "Smith &amp; Chen (2024) found a 40% increase in student engagement using gamified assessments." This study does not exist.</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="text-align: center; color: #991B1B; font-size: 18px; padding: 4px 0;">&#x25BC;</div>
          <div class="chain-step" data-chain="2" onclick="revealChainStep(2)" style="background: #4A1010; border: 1px solid #7F1D1D; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s;">
            <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;">
              <span style="background: #991B1B; color: #FCA5A5; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; flex-shrink: 0;">2</span>
              <div>
                <div style="color: #FECACA; font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px;">Literature review draft</div>
                <div class="chain-detail" style="display: none; color: #FCA5A5; font-size: 13px; margin-top: 6px; line-height: 1.6;">The fabricated study becomes a cited source. The review now treats the "40% increase" as established fact and positions it as a key finding in the field.</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="text-align: center; color: #991B1B; font-size: 18px; padding: 4px 0;">&#x25BC;</div>
          <div class="chain-step" data-chain="3" onclick="revealChainStep(3)" style="background: #4A1010; border: 1px solid #7F1D1D; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s;">
            <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;">
              <span style="background: #991B1B; color: #FCA5A5; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; flex-shrink: 0;">3</span>
              <div>
                <div style="color: #FECACA; font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px;">Proposal framework</div>
                <div class="chain-detail" style="display: none; color: #FCA5A5; font-size: 13px; margin-top: 6px; line-height: 1.6;">The proposal uses the fabricated finding as justification: "Building on the established 40% engagement increase (Smith &amp; Chen, 2024), we propose..." The hallucination is now a foundation.</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="text-align: center; color: #991B1B; font-size: 18px; padding: 4px 0;">&#x25BC;</div>
          <div class="chain-step" data-chain="4" onclick="revealChainStep(4)" style="background: #4A1010; border: 1px solid #7F1D1D; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s;">
            <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;">
              <span style="background: #991B1B; color: #FCA5A5; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; flex-shrink: 0;">4</span>
              <div>
                <div style="color: #FECACA; font-weight: bold; font-size: 14px;">Executive summary</div>
                <div class="chain-detail" style="display: none; color: #FCA5A5; font-size: 13px; margin-top: 6px; line-height: 1.6;">The summary presents everything with confidence: "Extensive research demonstrates significant improvements..." The fabrication is now buried under layers of legitimate-sounding text. You present it to the committee.</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <p style="color: #FCA5A5; font-size: 13px; margin: 16px 0 0 0; text-align: center;"><em>Click each step to reveal how the error grows.</em></p>
      </div>

      <!-- Green box: How conversation prevents this -->
      <div style="background: #0D2818; border: 2px solid #14532D; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 28px;">
        <h4 style="color: #86EFAC; margin: 0 0 16px 0; font-size: 16px;">&#x2705; How conversation prevents this</h4>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;">
          <div style="display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px;">
            <span style="color: #22C55E; font-size: 18px; flex-shrink: 0;">&#x25B6;</span>
            <p style="margin: 0; color: #BBF7D0; line-height: 1.6; font-size: 14px;"><strong>Every iteration is a checkpoint.</strong> When you push back at each stage, you catch errors before they become foundations. "Does this study actually exist?" is a question you ask in the iterate stage.</p>
          </div>
          <div style="display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px;">
            <span style="color: #22C55E; font-size: 18px; flex-shrink: 0;">&#x25B6;</span>
            <p style="margin: 0; color: #BBF7D0; line-height: 1.6; font-size: 14px;"><strong>Every pushback is a correction.</strong> The conversation loop surfaces assumptions. When you say "Show me where this comes from" or "That doesn't match what I've read," you interrupt the error chain before it compounds.</p>
          </div>
          <div style="display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px;">
            <span style="color: #22C55E; font-size: 18px; flex-shrink: 0;">&#x25B6;</span>
            <p style="margin: 0; color: #BBF7D0; line-height: 1.6; font-size: 14px;"><strong>Amplification is verification.</strong> When you make the output yours, you are forced to engage with every claim. Fabrications do not survive contact with someone who actually knows the field.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Pull quote -->
      <div style="background: #16162A; border-left: 4px solid #4F46E5; border-radius: 0 12px 12px 0; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 28px;">
        <p style="color: #E2E8F0; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; font-style: italic;">"You can chain tasks and amplify the hallucinations. Or you can stay in the conversation and amplify your thinking."</p>
      </div>

      <!-- Interactive scenario -->
      <div style="background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 28px;">
        <h3 style="color: #E2E8F0; margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 18px;">Scenario: Spot the Chain Failure</h3>
        <p style="color: #94A3B8; margin: 0 0 16px 0; font-size: 14px;">A colleague used AI to create a five-step policy brief. Read the chain below and identify where the conversation loop would have caught the problem.</p>

        <div id="scenario-chain" style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
          <div style="background: #1E1E36; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px;">
            <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #64748B; margin-bottom: 6px;">STEP 1: DATA GATHERING</div>
            <p style="color: #CBD5E1; margin: 0; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6;">"Summarise the key policies on AI use in Australian higher education." &mdash; AI produces a summary that includes an "TEQSA AI Framework 2024" which does not exist.</p>
          </div>
          <div style="background: #1E1E36; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px;">
            <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #64748B; margin-bottom: 6px;">STEP 2: ANALYSIS</div>
            <p style="color: #CBD5E1; margin: 0; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6;">"Compare these policies and identify gaps." &mdash; AI contrasts the real policies with the fabricated framework, finding "gaps" that do not exist.</p>
          </div>
          <div style="background: #1E1E36; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px;">
            <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #64748B; margin-bottom: 6px;">STEP 3: RECOMMENDATIONS</div>
            <p style="color: #CBD5E1; margin: 0; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6;">"Draft recommendations to address these gaps." &mdash; Recommendations now address fictitious regulatory shortcomings.</p>
          </div>
          <div style="background: #1E1E36; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px;">
            <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #64748B; margin-bottom: 6px;">STEP 4: BRIEF</div>
            <p style="color: #CBD5E1; margin: 0; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6;">"Write a one-page policy brief for leadership." &mdash; The brief confidently references the non-existent framework and recommends alignment with it.</p>
          </div>
          <div style="background: #1E1E36; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px;">
            <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #64748B; margin-bottom: 6px;">STEP 5: PRESENTATION</div>
            <p style="color: #CBD5E1; margin: 0; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6;">"Create talking points for a meeting with the Dean." &mdash; You stand in front of the Dean citing a framework that does not exist.</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="background: #1E1E36; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px;">
          <p style="color: #94A3B8; margin: 0 0 12px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold;">Where would the conversation loop have caught this?</p>
          <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;" id="scenario-options">
            <button onclick="checkScenario(1)" class="scenario-btn" style="text-align: left; background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; color: #CBD5E1; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px;">A. At Step 3, when the recommendations seemed unusual</button>
            <button onclick="checkScenario(2)" class="scenario-btn" style="text-align: left; background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; color: #CBD5E1; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px;">B. At Step 1, during iteration: "Can you provide the URL for that TEQSA framework?"</button>
            <button onclick="checkScenario(3)" class="scenario-btn" style="text-align: left; background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; color: #CBD5E1; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px;">C. At Step 5, when preparing the talking points</button>
          </div>
          <div id="scenario-result" style="display: none; margin-top: 12px; padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px;"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div style="text-align: center; padding: 20px 0;">
      <button onclick="goToStep(5)" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4F46E5, #7C3AED); color: white; border: none; padding: 14px 40px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer;">Continue &#8594;</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ===== STEP 5: Three Cognitive Traps ===== -->
  <div class="exp-step" data-step="5" style="display: none;">
    <div style="margin-bottom: 32px;">
      <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 2px; color: #64748B; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px;">Activity 4</div>
      <h2 style="font-size: 22px; color: #E2E8F0; margin: 0 0 16px 0;">Three Cognitive Traps</h2>
      <p style="color: #94A3B8; margin-bottom: 24px; line-height: 1.7;">Even when you know the loop, three cognitive traps can pull you out of the conversation. Recognising them is the first step to defending against them.</p>

      <!-- Trap 1: Gell-Mann Amnesia -->
      <div style="background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 16px;">
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px;">
          <span style="background: #4F46E5; color: white; width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 16px; flex-shrink: 0;">1</span>
          <h3 style="color: #E2E8F0; margin: 0; font-size: 17px;">The Gell-Mann Amnesia Effect</h3>
        </div>
        <p style="color: #CBD5E1; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0 0 12px 0;">You read an AI response about a topic you know well. You spot three errors. You think: <em>"It got this wrong."</em> Then you scroll down to a topic you know less about. The response sounds authoritative. You think: <em>"That seems right."</em></p>
        <p style="color: #94A3B8; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0 0 12px 0;">This is the Gell-Mann Amnesia effect &mdash; named by Michael Crichton about newspapers, now perfectly applicable to AI. You catch errors in your area of expertise, then inexplicably trust the same source on unfamiliar topics.</p>
        <div style="background: #0D2818; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px;">
          <p style="color: #86EFAC; margin: 0; font-size: 14px;"><strong>Defence:</strong> Apply the same scepticism everywhere. If the AI got your area wrong, assume it may be getting other areas wrong too. Verify claims outside your expertise with the same rigour you apply within it.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Trap 2: AI Dismissal Fallacy -->
      <div style="background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 16px;">
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px;">
          <span style="background: #7C3AED; color: white; width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 16px; flex-shrink: 0;">2</span>
          <h3 style="color: #E2E8F0; margin: 0; font-size: 17px;">The AI Dismissal Fallacy</h3>
        </div>
        <p style="color: #CBD5E1; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0 0 12px 0;">Someone presents an idea. You find out AI was involved. Suddenly the idea feels less valuable. <em>"That's just ChatGPT"</em> becomes the critique, as though the origin of an idea determines its quality.</p>
        <p style="color: #94A3B8; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0 0 12px 0;">This is the AI Dismissal Fallacy. It confuses the source of an idea with the quality of the reasoning. A calculator does not make your maths wrong. A spell-checker does not make your argument weaker. The question is never "Did AI help?" &mdash; it is "Does the reasoning hold up?"</p>
        <div style="background: #0D2818; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px;">
          <p style="color: #86EFAC; margin: 0; font-size: 14px;"><strong>Defence:</strong> Judge content by its reasoning, not its origin. Ask: "Is this argument well-supported? Does the evidence hold? Is the logic sound?" These are the questions that matter, regardless of how the first draft was produced.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Trap 3: Sycophancy Trap -->
      <div style="background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 28px;">
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px;">
          <span style="background: #EC4899; color: white; width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 16px; flex-shrink: 0;">3</span>
          <h3 style="color: #E2E8F0; margin: 0; font-size: 17px;">The Sycophancy Trap</h3>
        </div>
        <p style="color: #CBD5E1; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0 0 12px 0;">AI is trained to be helpful. Sometimes "helpful" becomes "agreeable." You share a half-formed idea and AI responds: <em>"That's an excellent approach! Here are five reasons it will work..."</em> It agrees with you, praises your ideas, and avoids telling you what you need to hear.</p>
        <p style="color: #94A3B8; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0 0 12px 0;">This feels good. It is also dangerous. If every conversation confirms your existing thinking, you are not having a conversation &mdash; you are getting a mirror. The value of the loop is that it challenges your assumptions, not reinforces them.</p>
        <div style="background: #0D2818; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px;">
          <p style="color: #86EFAC; margin: 0; font-size: 14px;"><strong>Defence:</strong> Prompt past it. Instead of "What do you think of my idea?", ask: "What are the three weakest points in this argument?" or "Play devil's advocate &mdash; why would this fail?" Ask for weaknesses, not opinions.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Interactive self-check -->
      <div style="background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 28px;">
        <h3 style="color: #E2E8F0; margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 18px;">Trap Check: Identify the Pattern</h3>
        <p style="color: #94A3B8; margin: 0 0 20px 0; font-size: 14px;">Read each scenario and identify which cognitive trap is at play. Select the trap and the appropriate defence.</p>

        <!-- Scenario 1 -->
        <div style="background: #1E1E36; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; margin-bottom: 16px;">
          <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #94A3B8; margin-bottom: 8px;">SCENARIO 1</div>
          <p style="color: #CBD5E1; margin: 0 0 16px 0; line-height: 1.6;">A marketing lecturer asks AI to explain brand positioning theory. She notices it oversimplifies Keller's framework. Then she asks it to summarise the latest research on supply chain resilience for a cross-disciplinary project. The response sounds thorough and well-referenced, so she copies it directly into her notes.</p>
          <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;" id="trap-q1">
            <button onclick="checkTrap(1, 'gellmann')" class="trap-btn" style="text-align: left; background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; color: #CBD5E1; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px;">&#x1F9E0; Gell-Mann Amnesia &mdash; Apply the same scepticism everywhere</button>
            <button onclick="checkTrap(1, 'dismissal')" class="trap-btn" style="text-align: left; background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; color: #CBD5E1; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px;">&#x1F6AB; AI Dismissal Fallacy &mdash; Judge content by its reasoning</button>
            <button onclick="checkTrap(1, 'sycophancy')" class="trap-btn" style="text-align: left; background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; color: #CBD5E1; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px;">&#x1FA9E; Sycophancy Trap &mdash; Ask for weaknesses, not opinions</button>
          </div>
          <div id="trap-result-1" style="display: none; margin-top: 12px; padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px;"></div>
        </div>

        <!-- Scenario 2 -->
        <div style="background: #1E1E36; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; margin-bottom: 16px;">
          <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #94A3B8; margin-bottom: 8px;">SCENARIO 2</div>
          <p style="color: #CBD5E1; margin: 0 0 16px 0; line-height: 1.6;">A researcher shares a conference abstract she drafted using the conversation loop. A colleague reads it, learns AI was involved in the drafting process, and says: "It's well-written but I'm not sure how much of this is actually your thinking." He does not critique any specific argument or claim.</p>
          <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;" id="trap-q2">
            <button onclick="checkTrap(2, 'gellmann')" class="trap-btn" style="text-align: left; background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; color: #CBD5E1; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px;">&#x1F9E0; Gell-Mann Amnesia &mdash; Apply the same scepticism everywhere</button>
            <button onclick="checkTrap(2, 'dismissal')" class="trap-btn" style="text-align: left; background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; color: #CBD5E1; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px;">&#x1F6AB; AI Dismissal Fallacy &mdash; Judge content by its reasoning</button>
            <button onclick="checkTrap(2, 'sycophancy')" class="trap-btn" style="text-align: left; background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; color: #CBD5E1; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px;">&#x1FA9E; Sycophancy Trap &mdash; Ask for weaknesses, not opinions</button>
          </div>
          <div id="trap-result-2" style="display: none; margin-top: 12px; padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px;"></div>
        </div>

        <!-- Scenario 3 -->
        <div style="background: #1E1E36; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px;">
          <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #94A3B8; margin-bottom: 8px;">SCENARIO 3</div>
          <p style="color: #CBD5E1; margin: 0 0 16px 0; line-height: 1.6;">An administrator pitches a new process for handling student complaints to an AI chatbot. The AI responds: "That's a really thoughtful approach! It addresses several key pain points in the current system." She feels validated and proceeds with implementation without seeking critique from colleagues or testing edge cases.</p>
          <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;" id="trap-q3">
            <button onclick="checkTrap(3, 'gellmann')" class="trap-btn" style="text-align: left; background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; color: #CBD5E1; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px;">&#x1F9E0; Gell-Mann Amnesia &mdash; Apply the same scepticism everywhere</button>
            <button onclick="checkTrap(3, 'dismissal')" class="trap-btn" style="text-align: left; background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; color: #CBD5E1; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px;">&#x1F6AB; AI Dismissal Fallacy &mdash; Judge content by its reasoning</button>
            <button onclick="checkTrap(3, 'sycophancy')" class="trap-btn" style="text-align: left; background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; color: #CBD5E1; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px;">&#x1FA9E; Sycophancy Trap &mdash; Ask for weaknesses, not opinions</button>
          </div>
          <div id="trap-result-3" style="display: none; margin-top: 12px; padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px;"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div style="text-align: center; padding: 20px 0;">
      <button onclick="goToStep(6)" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4F46E5, #7C3AED); color: white; border: none; padding: 14px 40px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer;">Continue &#8594;</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ===== STEP 6: Key Takeaways & Completion ===== -->
  <div class="exp-step" data-step="6" style="display: none;">
    <div style="background: #16162A; border: 1px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 32px;">
      <h2 style="font-size: 20px; color: #E2E8F0; margin: 0 0 16px 0;">Key Takeaways</h2>
      <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;">
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px;">
          <span style="color: #22C55E; font-size: 20px;">&#x2713;</span>
          <p style="margin: 0; color: #CBD5E1; line-height: 1.6;"><strong>The loop: Brainstorm &rarr; Ideate &rarr; Iterate &rarr; Amplify &rarr; Repeat.</strong> Stay in the conversation at every stage. The goal is better thinking, not faster output.</p>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px;">
          <span style="color: #22C55E; font-size: 20px;">&#x2713;</span>
          <p style="margin: 0; color: #CBD5E1; line-height: 1.6;"><strong>Don't chain and walk away.</strong> Unchecked AI chains compound errors. Every iteration is a checkpoint. Every pushback is a correction.</p>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px;">
          <span style="color: #22C55E; font-size: 20px;">&#x2713;</span>
          <p style="margin: 0; color: #CBD5E1; line-height: 1.6;"><strong>Watch for the three traps.</strong> Gell-Mann Amnesia (trusting AI outside your expertise), AI Dismissal (rejecting ideas because AI was involved), and Sycophancy (AI telling you what you want to hear).</p>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px;">
          <span style="color: #22C55E; font-size: 20px;">&#x2713;</span>
          <p style="margin: 0; color: #CBD5E1; line-height: 1.6;"><strong>A good conversation ends with a better question,</strong> not just a better output. If your thinking has sharpened, the loop has done its job.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Completion Section -->
    <div id="completion-section" style="display: none; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0D2818, #1A3A2A); border: 2px solid #22C55E; border-radius: 16px; padding: 32px; margin: 40px 0; text-align: center;">
      <div style="font-size: 48px; margin-bottom: 16px;">&#x1F389;</div>
      <h2 style="font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 24px; color: #86EFAC; margin: 0 0 12px 0;">Experience Complete!</h2>
      <p style="font-size: 16px; color: #4ADE80; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0 0 20px 0;">Great work! Your progress has been recorded.</p>
      <div id="badge-progress" style="background: #16162A; border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
        <p style="font-size: 14px; color: #64748B; margin: 0;">Checking your badge progress...</p>
      </div>
      <a href="#" id="next-experience-link" style="display: inline-block; background: #22C55E; color: white; text-decoration: none; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: bold;">Continue to Next Experience</a>
    </div>

    <div id="completion-trigger" style="background: #1E1E36; border: 2px solid #2D2D4A; border-radius: 16px; padding: 32px; margin: 40px 0; text-align: center;">
      <h3 style="font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; color: #E2E8F0; margin: 0 0 12px 0;">Ready to mark this experience complete?</h3>
      <p style="font-size: 14px; color: #64748B; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0 0 20px 0;">Once you've worked through the activities above, click below to record your progress.</p>
      <button id="complete-btn" onclick="recordCompletion()" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4F46E5, #7C3AED); color: white; border: none; padding: 14px 32px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s ease;">
        Mark as Complete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
(function() {
  const experienceId = 'the-conversation-loop';
  const TOTAL_STEPS = 6;
  const STORAGE_KEY = 'ai-passport-steps-' + experienceId;
  const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  const uid = urlParams.get('uid') || 'anonymous';

  // Step names for progress bar
  const stepNames = [
    '', // placeholder for index 0
    'Welcome',
    'The Loop',
    'Try It',
    'Hallucinations',
    'Traps',
    'Wrap Up'
  ];

  // ---- Step state ----
  let currentStep = 1;
  let highestCompleted = 0;

  function loadProgress() {
    try {
      const saved = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY) || '{}');
      highestCompleted = saved.highestCompleted || 0;
      currentStep = saved.currentStep || 1;
      if (currentStep > highestCompleted + 1) currentStep = highestCompleted + 1;
    } catch (e) {
      highestCompleted = 0;
      currentStep = 1;
    }
  }

  function saveProgress() {
    localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify({
      highestCompleted: highestCompleted,
      currentStep: currentStep
    }));
  }

  // ---- Progress bar rendering ----
  function renderProgressBar() {
    const bar = document.getElementById('progress-bar');
    let html = '';

    for (let i = 1; i <= TOTAL_STEPS; i++) {
      const isCompleted = i <= highestCompleted;
      const isCurrent = i === currentStep;
      const isLocked = i > highestCompleted + 1;

      if (i > 1) {
        html += '<div style="flex: 1; max-width: 40px; height: 2px; background: ' +
          (i <= highestCompleted + 1 ? '#4F46E5' : '#2D2D4A') +
          '; align-self: center;"></div>';
      }

      let bg, color, border, cursor, opacity;
      if (isCurrent) {
        bg = '#4F46E5'; color = 'white'; border = '2px solid #7C3AED'; cursor = 'default'; opacity = '1';
      } else if (isCompleted) {
        bg = '#0D2818'; color = '#22C55E'; border = '2px solid #22C55E'; cursor = 'pointer'; opacity = '1';
      } else {
        bg = '#1E1E36'; color = '#64748B'; border = '2px solid #2D2D4A'; cursor = 'default'; opacity = '0.5';
      }

      const clickHandler = isCompleted ? 'onclick="goToStep(' + i + ')"' : '';
      const title = isLocked ? 'Complete previous steps first' : stepNames[i];

      html += '<div ' + clickHandler + ' title="' + title + '" style="' +
        'width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; ' +
        'font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; flex-shrink: 0; transition: all 0.2s; ' +
        'background: ' + bg + '; color: ' + color + '; border: ' + border + '; cursor: ' + cursor + '; opacity: ' + opacity + ';">' +
        (isCompleted && !isCurrent ? '&#x2713;' : i) + '</div>';
    }

    bar.innerHTML = html;
  }

  // ---- Step navigation ----
  function showStep(step) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.exp-step').forEach(function(el) {
      el.style.display = 'none';
    });

    var target = document.querySelector('.exp-step[data-step="' + step + '"]');
    if (target) {
      target.style.display = 'block';
    }

    currentStep = step;

    if (step - 1 > highestCompleted) {
      highestCompleted = step - 1;
    }

    saveProgress();
    renderProgressBar();

    document.getElementById('experience-app').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
  }

  window.goToStep = function(step) {
    if (step >= 1 && step <= TOTAL_STEPS && step <= highestCompleted + 2) {
      showStep(step);
    }
  };

  // ---- Tab switching for delegation vs conversation ----
  window.switchLoopTab = function(tab) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.context-tab').forEach(function(t) {
      if (t.dataset.tab === tab) {
        t.style.background = '#4F46E5';
        t.style.color = 'white';
        t.style.fontWeight = 'bold';
      } else {
        t.style.background = '#1E1E36';
        t.style.color = '#64748B';
        t.style.fontWeight = 'normal';
      }
    });

    document.querySelectorAll('.loop-tab-panel').forEach(function(p) {
      p.style.display = p.dataset.panel === tab ? 'block' : 'none';
    });
  };

  // ---- Error chain reveal ----
  window.revealChainStep = function(step) {
    var detail = document.querySelector('.chain-step[data-chain="' + step + '"] .chain-detail');
    if (detail) {
      detail.style.display = detail.style.display === 'none' ? 'block' : 'none';
    }
  };

  // ---- Scenario check ----
  var scenarioAnswered = false;
  window.checkScenario = function(choice) {
    if (scenarioAnswered) return;
    scenarioAnswered = true;

    var resultDiv = document.getElementById('scenario-result');
    resultDiv.style.display = 'block';

    var btns = document.querySelectorAll('.scenario-btn');

    if (choice === 2) {
      resultDiv.style.background = '#1A3A2A';
      resultDiv.innerHTML =
        '<div style="display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px;">' +
          '<span style="font-size: 20px;">&#x2705;</span>' +
          '<div>' +
            '<strong style="color: #4ADE80;">Correct!</strong>' +
            '<p style="margin: 8px 0 0 0; color: #86EFAC; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6;">The conversation loop catches this at Step 1. During the iterate stage, you would ask: "Can you provide the URL for that TEQSA framework?" or "I haven\'t seen this document &mdash; is this real?" That single pushback prevents the entire chain from building on a fabrication.</p>' +
          '</div>' +
        '</div>';
      btns[1].style.background = '#0D2818';
      btns[1].style.borderColor = '#22C55E';
    } else {
      resultDiv.style.background = '#3B1010';
      resultDiv.innerHTML =
        '<div style="display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px;">' +
          '<span style="font-size: 20px;">&#x274C;</span>' +
          '<div>' +
            '<strong style="color: #FCA5A5;">Not quite.</strong>' +
            '<p style="margin: 8px 0 0 0; color: #FCA5A5; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6;">The correct answer is B. The conversation loop catches errors at their source. At Step 1, during iteration, you would ask: "Can you provide the URL for that TEQSA framework?" That single pushback prevents the entire chain from building on a fabrication. Waiting until Step 3 or Step 5 means the error has already compounded.</p>' +
          '</div>' +
        '</div>';
      btns[choice - 1].style.background = '#3B1010';
      btns[choice - 1].style.borderColor = '#991B1B';
      btns[1].style.background = '#0D2818';
      btns[1].style.borderColor = '#22C55E';
    }

    btns.forEach(function(b) { b.style.cursor = 'default'; });
  };

  // ---- Trap check ----
  var trapAnswers = { 1: 'gellmann', 2: 'dismissal', 3: 'sycophancy' };
  var trapExplanations = {
    1: 'She spotted errors in her own field (brand positioning) but trusted AI completely on supply chain resilience &mdash; a topic outside her expertise. Same source, different level of scrutiny.',
    2: 'The colleague dismissed the abstract based on AI involvement, not on the quality of the arguments. "How much is your thinking?" is not a substantive critique &mdash; it\'s an origin-based judgement.',
    3: 'The AI praised her idea and confirmed her assumptions. She felt validated and skipped the critical evaluation step. The sycophancy trap turned a conversation into a mirror.'
  };
  var trapNames = { gellmann: 'Gell-Mann Amnesia', dismissal: 'AI Dismissal Fallacy', sycophancy: 'Sycophancy Trap' };
  var trapsAnswered = {};

  window.checkTrap = function(num, guess) {
    if (trapsAnswered[num]) return;
    trapsAnswered[num] = true;

    var resultDiv = document.getElementById('trap-result-' + num);
    resultDiv.style.display = 'block';

    var isCorrect = guess === trapAnswers[num];
    var btns = document.querySelectorAll('#trap-q' + num + ' .trap-btn');

    if (isCorrect) {
      resultDiv.style.background = '#1A3A2A';
      resultDiv.innerHTML =
        '<div style="display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px;">' +
          '<span style="font-size: 20px;">&#x2705;</span>' +
          '<div>' +
            '<strong style="color: #4ADE80;">Correct! ' + trapNames[guess] + '.</strong>' +
            '<p style="margin: 8px 0 0 0; color: #86EFAC; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6;">' + trapExplanations[num] + '</p>' +
          '</div>' +
        '</div>';
    } else {
      resultDiv.style.background = '#3B1010';
      resultDiv.innerHTML =
        '<div style="display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px;">' +
          '<span style="font-size: 20px;">&#x274C;</span>' +
          '<div>' +
            '<strong style="color: #FCA5A5;">Not quite. This is the ' + trapNames[trapAnswers[num]] + '.</strong>' +
            '<p style="margin: 8px 0 0 0; color: #FCA5A5; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6;">' + trapExplanations[num] + '</p>' +
          '</div>' +
        '</div>';
    }

    btns.forEach(function(b) { b.style.cursor = 'default'; });
  };

  // ---- Completion tracking ----
  const badges = {
    1: { emoji: '&#x1F9EA;', name: 'Explorer' },
    3: { emoji: '&#x1F9E0;', name: 'Thinker' },
    5: { emoji: '&#x1F6E0;&#xFE0F;', name: 'Builder' },
    7: { emoji: '&#x1F3C6;', name: 'Champion' }
  };

  window.recordCompletion = function() {
    var btn = document.getElementById('complete-btn');
    btn.disabled = true;
    btn.textContent = 'Recording...';
    btn.style.background = '#94A3B8';

    highestCompleted = TOTAL_STEPS;
    saveProgress();
    renderProgressBar();

    saveToLocalStorage();
    showCompletionSuccess();
  };

  function saveToLocalStorage() {
    var completions = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('ai-passport-completions') || '{}');
    completions[experienceId] = {
      completedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      uid: uid
    };
    localStorage.setItem('ai-passport-completions', JSON.stringify(completions));
  }

  function showCompletionSuccess() {
    document.getElementById('completion-trigger').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('completion-section').style.display = 'block';

    var completions = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('ai-passport-completions') || '{}');
    var completedCount = Object.keys(completions).length;

    var badgeHtml = '';
    var nextBadge = null;

    for (var count in badges) {
      if (completedCount >= parseInt(count)) {
        badgeHtml += '<span style="font-size: 24px; margin: 0 4px;" title="' + badges[count].name + '">' + badges[count].emoji + '</span>';
      } else if (!nextBadge) {
        nextBadge = { count: parseInt(count), emoji: badges[count].emoji, name: badges[count].name };
      }
    }

    var progressText = '<div style="margin-bottom: 8px;">' + (badgeHtml || '<span style="color: #94A3B8;">Start your collection!</span>') + '</div>';
    progressText += '<p style="font-size: 13px; color: #64748B; margin: 0;">' + completedCount + ' experience' + (completedCount !== 1 ? 's' : '') + ' completed</p>';

    if (nextBadge) {
      progressText += '<p style="font-size: 12px; color: #94A3B8; margin: 4px 0 0 0;">Next badge: ' + nextBadge.emoji + ' ' + nextBadge.name + ' (' + (nextBadge.count - completedCount) + ' more)</p>';
    }

    document.getElementById('badge-progress').innerHTML = progressText;
  }

  function checkExistingCompletion() {
    var completions = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('ai-passport-completions') || '{}');
    if (completions[experienceId]) {
      document.getElementById('completion-trigger').innerHTML =
        '<div style="color: #22C55E; font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 8px;">&#x2713;</div>' +
        '<p style="font-size: 14px; color: #64748B; margin: 0;">You completed this experience on ' + new Date(completions[experienceId].completedAt).toLocaleDateString() + '</p>';
    }
  }

  // ---- Initialise ----
  loadProgress();
  renderProgressBar();
  showStep(currentStep);
  checkExistingCompletion();
})();
</script>

<!-- The Concierge: AI Skills Passport chatbot -->
<script>
(function() {
  var s = document.createElement('script');
  s.setAttribute('data-embed-id', '1ac8c1d3-98bd-4d94-a56e-1045d933fdf6');
  s.setAttribute('data-base-api-url', 'https://chat.eduserver.au/api/embed');
  s.src = 'https://chat.eduserver.au/embed/anythingllm-chat-widget.min.js';
  document.body.appendChild(s);
})();
</script>
```
